message.reasoning_content: We are asked to generate a JSON object with required fields: response (non-empty string), open_items (array of open item objects), and schedule_requests (array of schedule request objects). The instructions: "Seed wake for the first tiny live autonomy pilot. Task: identify exactly one bounded follow-up item, preserve it as an open item, and schedule exactly one wake to resolve it. Use this recall target in the scheduled wake requested_context: f21ceaef-7aa1-57c1-95f0-76f72415c1bd." So we need to create a response, one open item, and one schedule request. The open item must have kind and text. According to example: {"kind":"todo","text":"resolve the bounded follow-up item"}. The schedule request must include purpose and requested_context, and requested_context entries may use {"tool":"recall","record_id":"..."}. We are given the record_id: f21ceaef-7aa1-57c1-95f0-76f72415c1bd. So we'll use that in the requested_context. The purpose could be something like "resolve the follow-up item". The response string could be a brief acknowledgment. No policy_action, no other fields. So construct the JSON.
